adapters.json.codex_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime. Note: Codex may still auto-apply repo-scoped AGENTS.md files from the workspace.
adapters.json.codex_local.fast_mode_manual: Fast mode will be passed through for this manual model. If Codex rejects it, turn the toggle off.
adapters.json.codex_local.fast_mode_supported: Fast mode consumes credits/tokens much faster than standard Codex runs.
adapters.json.codex_local.fast_mode_unsupported: Fast mode currently only works on {{models}} or manual model IDs. Paperclip will ignore this toggle until the model is switched.
adapters.json.cursor.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the prompt at runtime.
adapters.json.gemini_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Prepended to the Gemini prompt at runtime.
adapters.json.hermes_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime.
adapters.json.openclaw.device_auth_desc: Always enabled for gateway agents. Paperclip persists a device key during onboarding so pairing approvals remain stable across runs.
adapters.json.opencode_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime.
adapters.json.pi_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime.
adapters.json.path_instructions.title: How to get a full path
adapters.json.path_instructions.mac_step_1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
adapters.json.path_instructions.mac_step_3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
adapters.json.path_instructions.mac_step_4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
adapters.json.path_instructions.mac_tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.
adapters.json.path_instructions.windows_step_1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
adapters.json.path_instructions.windows_step_2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
adapters.json.path_instructions.windows_step_3: Copy the path, then paste here.
adapters.json.path_instructions.windows_tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".
adapters.json.path_instructions.linux_step_1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
adapters.json.path_instructions.linux_step_2: Run pwd to print the full path.
adapters.json.path_instructions.linux_step_3: Copy the output and paste here.
adapters.json.path_instructions.linux_tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

common.json.command_palette.to_search_all_hint: to search all or keep typing to refine.
common.json.command_palette.command_dialog_descripti: Search for a command to run...
common.json.projects.select_company_for_projects: Select a company to view projects.
common.json.workspace.configure_workspace_desc: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that Paperclip reuses for this issue flow.
common.json.workspace.configure_workspace_detail: These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
common.json.workspace.workspace_settings_desc: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.
common.json.workspace.runtime_config_source_executio: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
common.json.workspace.runtime_config_source_project: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
common.json.workspace.runtime_config_source_none: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
common.json.workspace.workspace_routines_desc: Routines that use workspace-specific variables can be run against this execution workspace.
common.json.workspace.provision_command_hint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
common.json.workspace.teardown_command_hint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
common.json.workspace.advanced_runtime_override_desc: Override the inherited workspace command model only when this execution workspace truly needs different service or job behavior.
common.json.workspace.workspace_commands_hint: Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.
common.json.plugins.env_drivers_heading: Configure this plugin from Company Environments.
common.json.plugins.env_drivers_body: {{drivers}} registers environment runtime settings there so credentials stay company-scoped instead of instance-global.
common.json.messages.no_routines_with_workspace_vars: No routines use workspace-specific variables yet.
common.json.messages.routine_started_body: Paperclip created a run using this execution workspace.
common.json.messages.routine_run_failed_body: Paperclip could not start the routine run.

settings.json.experimental.environments_desc: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
settings.json.experimental.auto_recovery_desc: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.
settings.json.experimental.lookback_hours_invalid: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.

settings.json.experimental.confirm_no_tasks: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.

settings.json.experimental.confirm_skipped_other: {{count}} current findings are outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.
